messages.content:
Translate
"잠깐만 이게 뭔데?"
"삐삐 인형 옷 입고 어린이들이랑 가위바위보해서연속으로 5번 이기면 촬영 끝"
"잠깐만 그러면 나 이거 쓰고, 가위바위보해서 이기면 칼퇴야?"
"칼퇴시켜줄게"
"아 오케이! 그럼 나 지금 입을거야내가 막 가위바위보 엄청 잘하지 또~아이 참잠깐 근데 나 옷입는거 지켜볼거야? 저리가!다 입고 나갈테니까"

"Wait, what is this?"
"If you wear this beep-beep doll costume and win rock-paper-scissors against the kids 5 times in a row, the shooting ends."
"Hold on, so you mean if I put this on and win rock-paper-scissors, I get to leave work early?"
"I'll let you leave early."
"Ah, okay! Then I'm going to put it on now. I'm super good at rock-paper-scissors. Oh boy, wait a sec, are you going to watch me get dressed? Go away! I'll come out once I'm dressed."

"나 삐삐~입었ㅇ... 아 근데 이게 앞이 안보여"
"<머리 욱여넣는중ㅋㅋ>"
"오 나왔다나 오늘 칼퇴시켜줄거지? 근데..눈이 여기밖에 안보여"
"<(삐삐 꽃게설)>"
"문을 여시오"

"I'm in the beep-beep costume... ah, but I can't see in front of me."
"<Stuffing head into costume LOL>"
"Hey, I'm out! You're going to let me leave early today, right? But I can only see through here."
"<(Beep-beep crab explanation)>"
"Open the door."

Translate
"(광교 앨리웨이 맥인싸 삐삐)"
"(Gwanggyo Alleyway's Trendy Beep-beep)"

Translate
"가위바위보 할 친구들 줄 좀 서볼까? 나랑 가위바위보해서 한번에 이기는 친구들은 풍선주는 거구나랑 가위바위보했는데 내가 연속으로 5번 이기면..."
"빨리 풍선 받고 싶은데"
"내가 이 인형탈을 벗는거야! 안에 누가 숨어있는지 궁금하지 않아요? 와~안궁금한가봐 (ㅋㅋ)"
"가위바위보 시작!"

"Shall we get in line to play rock-paper-scissors with me? For those who win against me in rock-paper-scissors at once, you'll get a balloon. And if I win five times in a row while playing rock-paper-scissors with you..."

"I want to get a balloon quickly."

"I'll take off this costume! Aren't you curious about who's inside? Wow, you're not curious, huh? (LOL)"

"Let's start rock-paper-scissors!"

Translate
"응급처치체험관_하임리히법(목에 이물질이 걸렸어요! 도와주세요!)"
"First Aid Experience Center – Heimlich Maneuver (There's something stuck in my throat! Please help!)"

Translate
"장소 이동중"
"약간 지금 피리부는 삐삐 아닙니까?"

"Moving locations"
"Isn't this somewhat like the Pied Piper right now?"

Translate
"먼길까지 따라와줘서 고마워요"
"Thank you for following me all this way."

Translate
"앨리웨이 광교 구독!!"
"Subscribe to Alleyway Gwanggyo!!"

Translate
"ガッシリしてますけども"
"It's quite firm."

Translate
"最も高いコスプレは いくらなのか!?-"
"How much is the most expensive costume!?"

Translate
"このコスプレは いくらかかっているのか?"
"How much does this cosplay cost?"

Translate
"子どもたちから可愛いって言われたい"
"I want to be called cute by the children."

Translate
"本当に可愛いけどね"
"But it's really cute though."

Translate
"大平長子さん 現在は講師として着ぐるみの 講習"
"Ms. Ohira Nagako currently instructs as a lecturer providing courses on mascot costumes."

Translate
"着ぐるみと言えば森北菜"
"Speaking of mascot costumes, there's Shinohara Sai."

Translate
"夢が叶う日"
"The day when a dream comes true."

Translate
"あ〜ちょっとちょっと"
"Ah, hey, wait a minute."

Translate
"グメですごめんなさい"
"I'm sorry, my bad."

Translate
"月曜に全国のご当地問題を調査してみた件"
"The case where we investigated local issues across the country on Monday."

Translate
"スタッフ: 出ちゃってますよ"
"オフレコですけど"
"僕の彼女です"

"Staff: It's showing."
"Off the record, but..."
"She's my girlfriend."

Translate
"支配人の彼女が 無給で手伝う"
"The manager's girlfriend helps out without pay."

Translate
"着ぐる民の方ですか?"
"ここで働いてる人ですか?"
"自うんですか~♡"
"まさに着ぐるみ民で趣味で着てる方何で戻らないんですか?"
"用意周到やな!"
"ホントに鳴らないんだ~♡。スカートめくり~♡"
"鳴らない〜♡やっはいり~♡"
"きょう不思議なロケに なりそうやな"
"みんなを 楽しませ"
"着ぐる民と一日デート♡"

"Are you part of the mascot community?"
"Do you work here?"
"Is it self-employment~♡?"
"Are you actually someone who enjoys wearing costumes as a hobby, so why don't you take it off?"
"You're really well-prepared, aren't you!"
"It really doesn't make a sound~♡ Lifting the skirt~♡"
"It doesn't chime~♡ Yay, we're in~♡"
"Today seems like it's going to be a magical shoot"
"Entertain everyone"
"A day date with the mascot community♡"

Translate
"食べられません!"
"It's not edible!"

Translate
"うすうすは 感じ取ってますけども…"
"I have a faint feeling about it, but..."

Translate
"うすうすは 感じ取ってますけどもかぶってるからですよね取っちゃいますか?"
"I have a faint feeling about it, but it's because I'm wearing it, right? Shall I take it off?"

Translate
"かたくなに拒否する着ぐる民"
"The mascot community adamantly refuses."

Translate
"かたくなに拒否する着ぐる民密室へ移動する事に･･･"
"The steadfastly refusing mascot community decides to move to a private room..."

Translate
"ここならお面を取っていい という事ですけども"
"This means it's okay to take off the mask here, right?"

"ここならお面を取っていい という事ですけどもちょっと疲れてますもんね取っちゃいますか?"
"いや~見たい♡"

"This means I can take off the mask here, right? But you're a little tired, aren't you? Shall we take it off?"
"No~ I want to see♡"

Translate
"かっきーさん"
"Kakki-san"

Translate
"これをやることによって 間にお子さんに喜んでもらえる"
"By doing this, I hope to bring joy to the children in between [activities or events]."

Translate
"ぎょっちさん"
"Gyotchi-san"

Translate
"ぎょっちさんの着ぐるみサイトですが、肌タイツの制作をしておられます。
　工房によって面の肌の色が微妙に違いますが、色の調整も対応してくれます。"
"Gyotchi-san's mascot costume site is where they make skin tights. Although the skin color of the face varies slightly depending on the workshop, they also accommodate color adjustments."
Translate "上のさくらちゃんの植毛前の面ですよー。"
"This is the mask of Sakura-chan before the hair implantation, you know."

Translate
"着ぐるみ関連イベント等で肌タイツ販売してます　着ぐるみ一式の製作など主に擬人化キャラメイン。  
近所でサークルメンバー緩募
造形・衣装作成・電子工作・化学実験プラント自動制御・計装盤ソフト"

"We sell skin tights at events related to mascot costumes and mainly produce a full set of costumes for anthropomorphized characters. 
We're loosely recruiting circle members in the neighborhood for sculpting, costume creation, electronic work, chemical experiments, plant automation control, and instrument panel software."
これをやることによって 間にお子さんに喜んでもらえるそれがやっぱりうれしい
"By doing this, I can make the children happy in between, and that's what really brings me joy."
